note: Module adds a per-row Remove button to multi-value field widgets via hook_field_widget_single_element_form_alter(); no admin UI/config. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 node form, my unlimited multi-value text field lets editors add rows but there's no way to delete a single value inline. What does the Multiple Fields Remove Button module add, and to which fields?
evals.expected_output: It adds a per-row 'Remove' submit button to every widget row of any field whose cardinality is not 1 (unlimited and fixed multi-value), which core lacks.

evals.prompt: How do I turn on the per-item Remove button for a multi-value field with the Multiple Fields Remove Button module? Is there a third-party widget setting on Manage form display to enable it?
evals.expected_output: There is no third-party widget setting and no admin config form. Enabling the module (drush en multiple_fields_remove_button -y) automatically adds the button to all supported multi-value fields; scoping is done via alter hooks.

evals.prompt: Which Drupal form alter hook does the multiple_fields_remove_button module implement to inject the Remove button into each multi-value widget row?
evals.expected_output: hook_field_widget_single_element_form_alter() adds $element['remove_button'] when the field cardinality is not 1.

evals.prompt: For an unlimited-cardinality field, which submit handler and AJAX callback function does the Remove button use to actually delete the item and renumber the deltas?
evals.expected_output: Unlimited fields use multiple_fields_remove_button_submit_handler() as #submit and multiple_fields_remove_button_js() as the #ajax callback, deleting the item, renumbering deltas and re-weighting rows.

evals.prompt: Does the multiple_fields_remove_button module behave differently for a fixed (limited) cardinality multi-value field versus an unlimited one? What callbacks handle the fixed case?
evals.expected_output: Yes. Fixed multi-value fields use multiple_fields_remove_button_fixed_submit_handler() and multiple_fields_remove_button_clear_value_js() to clear that row's value and shift the rest up, while unlimited fields delete the item outright.

evals.prompt: Which field widgets does multiple_fields_remove_button deliberately NOT add a Remove button to, and how can I exclude another widget?
evals.expected_output: It skips widgets that manage their own removal (e.g. media_library_widget, inline_entity_form_complex, entity_browser_entity_reference); add more via hook_multiple_field_remove_button_skip_widgets_alter().

evals.prompt: With multiple_fields_remove_button enabled, how do I limit the Remove button to only certain named fields instead of all supported multi-value fields?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_multiple_field_remove_button_included_fields_alter() and set $includedFields to the field machine names; only listed fields get a button.

evals.prompt: Why do I need multiple_fields_remove_button at all — doesn't Drupal core's multi-value 'Add another item' widget already let editors remove a value?
evals.expected_output: Core's multi-value widget only supports adding rows and reordering; it has no inline per-item remove button, so you must blank a value and save. This module adds that missing per-row Remove button.
